hypothesis: Softly reducing or increasing one sleeve's next-trade risk from only that sleeve's already realized outcomes may preserve density while avoiding the damage caused by hard shadow-PnL filters.

signal_contract.information_set: Only current-FTMO-cost net outcomes whose native exit precedes the next native entry.
signal_contract.same_bar_exit_rule: An exit sharing the next entry's M15 bucket is not yet observable and is excluded.
signal_contract.excluded_regime_outcomes: The known incomplete-bar year 2020 is excluded from both challenge starts and rolling sleeve history, matching the locked book development contract.
signal_contract.warmup: Use factor 1.0 until the full lookback is available.
signal_contract.score: Sum of the most recent N realized outcomes divided by nominal risk.
signal_contract.application: Multiply the complete next-trade path, commissions, floating PnL, and nominal risk by the selected factor; do not renormalize other sleeves.

selection_contract.development_survivor_rule: Strictly improve normal and adverse pass percentages versus control, with no increase in either daily- or max-breach percentage under either fill model.
selection_contract.winner_rule: Maximize the smaller normal/adverse pass improvement, then their sum, then prefer the lower maximum factor.
selection_contract.validation_rule: The one frozen winner must again strictly improve both 2023 fill models without increasing any breach percentage.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Open 2024-2025 only after the frozen winner passes validation; never promote a normal-only result.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
